testcase.name: Fill invalid details in Corporate Wellness form and capture warning

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: //input[@placeholder='Name' or @name='name' or @id='name']' (tried for 20 seconds with 500 milliseconds interval)

testcase.system-out: Given I am on the Practo home page..........................................passed When I navigate to the Corporate Wellness page..............................passed And I fill the form with invalid details....................................failed And I click the Schedule button.............................................skipped Then a warning or error message should be displayed.........................skipped And I capture and display the warning message...............................skipped

testcase.name: Pick all top city names from the Diagnostics page and store in a list

failure.message: At least one city must be listed

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: At least one city must be listed at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89) at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42) at org.junit.Assert.assertFalse(Assert.java:65) at stepDefinitions.DiagnosticsSteps.iShouldSeeTopCitiesListed(DiagnosticsSteps.java:20) at ✽.I should see the top cities listed(file:///C:/Users/2479722/OneDrive%20-%20Cognizant/Desktop/Finding_Hospital/Features/diagnostics.feature:14)

testcase.name: Find hospitals that are Open 24x7, have Parking and Rating above 3.5
